risks.summary: Project-specific validation was not defined beyond the starter strategy.
risks.mitigation: VALSTRAT-002 now defines Phase 1 search, explain, evaluation, security, performance, deployment, and MDE checks.

risks.summary: Phase 1 public acceptance depends on external OpenSearch and Cloudflare configuration.
risks.mitigation: GEN-003 loaded and evaluated the live cranfield-v0 OpenSearch index; GEN-004 configured Worker secrets, deployed Cloudflare, and verified public endpoints.

risks.summary: A candidate query architecture can overfit Cranfield if promoted before BEIR transferability evidence.
risks.mitigation: GEN-016 keeps refined prf-rerank candidate-only, records ADL-0002 as transferability-pending, and leaves the public default on ARCH-0.1.

risks.summary: Repeated remote OpenSearch evaluation can slow tuning and increase the chance of confusing infrastructure latency with reranker quality.
risks.mitigation: GEN-017 caches first-stage field-sum top-50 retrieval pools and tunes deterministic rerankers offline before remote validation of winners.

risks.summary: Vector/hybrid infrastructure can be mistaken for LLM embedding quality before a real embedding provider run exists.
risks.mitigation: GEN-018 labels local-hash artifacts as deterministic controls; GEN-019 adds real local Ollama evidence with provider/model/text-profile metadata and keeps ARCH-0.3-candidate unpromoted.

risks.summary: Chat-model embeddings may underperform dedicated retrieval embeddings or neural rerankers on Cranfield.
risks.mitigation: GEN-019 records Ollama llama3.1:8b as below refined PRF; GEN-022 confirms dedicated BGE retrieval embeddings materially outperform chat-model embeddings.

risks.summary: Supervised LTR can overfit Cranfield if in-sample gains are promoted as architecture improvements.
risks.mitigation: GEN-020 through GEN-022 record query-grouped 5-fold cross-validation as the promotion metric, label in-sample LTR as capacity evidence only, and keep ARCH-0.4-candidate unreleased until transferability and complexity comparison.

risks.summary: Offline BGE gains may not reproduce in remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid execution.
risks.mitigation: GEN-023 created a separate remote OpenSearch BGE candidate index and reproduced the graded gain with nDCG@10 0.3533 plus binary nDCG@20 0.4926, while keeping the public/default architecture unchanged.

risks.summary: Remote BGE hybrid can overfit Cranfield or add runtime cost if promoted before transferability and latency/cost evidence.
risks.mitigation: GEN-023 keeps ARCH-0.3-candidate unreleased and requires transferability, latency/cost review, and explicit promotion approval before any public/default switch.

risks.summary: Milestone endpoints can make candidate architectures look like accepted defaults or make BGE look runtime-ready before query-vector support exists.
risks.mitigation: GEN-024 milestone routes force explicit milestone metadata, keep /api/search unchanged, and return 501 milestone_runtime_not_enabled for ARCH-0.3 BGE until runtime query-vector support exists.
